candidates.why: Appears as a component under the COGS structure, with 'Cost of Revenues - Balancing value' and total rows indicating it rolls into the selected parent bucket 'Direct costs'. Adding separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Appears as another component of cost of revenues alongside other COGS D&A rows and balancing lines; it is embedded in the selected parent row 'Direct costs'.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is a summary D&A row for COGS, but it still sits within the cost-of-revenues breakdown that sums to the selected parent row 'Direct costs'. Therefore it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Direct costs, which functions as the parent/total COGS row. The explicit COGS D&A rows appear to be sub-components within that bucket, not separate same-level operating expenses to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Sales and marketing costs
candidates.why: Presented as a component under the selected parent row 'Selling and marketing costs', with a balancing row confirming inclusion in that bucket. Should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Appears within the administrative/SG&A breakdown and is offset by 'Administrative expenses - Balancing value', indicating inclusion in the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses'.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Also appears as a component inside the selected administrative/SG&A bucket rather than as a separate same-level line to add later.
Although potentially relevant by wording, it has no visible values and no clear evidence that it sits outside the selected XSGA bucket. Conservative treatment is to avoid adding it separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combined set of Selling and marketing costs, Administrative expenses, Employee benefits expense, and Other expenses. The visible SG&A D&A rows appear to be nested components of those selected parent rows, especially Selling and marketing costs and Administrative expenses, so separate addition would risk double counting. No separate R&D row is selected in XRD, but no clear standalone operating D&A row for R&D is visible above operating profit.
